positional_encoding.description: Fourier feature mapping that enables MLPs to learn high-frequency functions. Without positional encoding, coordinate-based MLPs are biased toward learning low-frequency functions.

parameters.name: Encoding levels
parameters.description: Number of frequency octaves (typically 10 for positions, 4 for directions)

volume_rendering.formula: C(r) = ∫_{t_n}^{t_f} T(t) · σ(r(t)) · c(r(t), d) dt
volume_rendering.description: The expected color along a ray, computed by integrating density-weighted radiance. T(t) is the accumulated transmittance (probability of the ray traveling to t without hitting anything).

components.name: Transmittance
components.description: Accumulated probability of ray reaching point t

components.name: Alpha
components.description: Opacity of sample i based on density and step size

components.name: Discrete rendering
components.description: Quadrature approximation of the rendering integral

components.name: Weight
components.description: Contribution weight of sample i to final color

hash_grid_encoding.description: Multi-resolution hash encoding from Instant-NGP. Uses spatial hashing at multiple resolutions with learned feature vectors, enabling fast training and inference.

camera_projection.distortion_model: x_d = x'(1 + k₁r² + k₂r⁴ + k₃r⁶) + 2p₁x'y' + p₂(r² + 2x'²)
